description_long: This is a modern grave monument set on a rectangular stone base, featuring a two-tone upright headstone with a distinctive asymmetrical design. The headstone is divided into a black polished section and a lighter gray stone section, with the black side bearing inscriptions and a metal cross. The grave is covered by two large, flat stone slabs, also in a light gray color, which rest on a slightly raised platform. At the foot of the grave, there is a decorative flower vase containing pink lilies, adding a touch of color and life to the otherwise somber structure. The materials appear to be primarily granite or marble, giving the monument a solid, durable appearance. The overall design is clean, contemporary, and respectful, suitable for a modern urban cemetery.
description: A modern grave monument with a two-tone upright headstone, gray stone slabs, and a flower vase with pink lilies. The structure is primarily granite or marble, with polished and matte finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the split black and gray upright headstone, with the black section on the left and the gray on the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the stone slabs and the upright headstone, with the flower vase visible at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the inscriptions, cross, and flower vase at the foot of the grave, with both stone slabs clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the layered stone slabs and the upright headstone from the right, with the flower vase at the near end.
